untranslatable_reason: This signal requires earnings announcement event data (timing of earnings announcements relative to market hours) which is not available in the allowed indicators list. The allowed indicators are limited to price, volume, and technical analysis metrics. Earnings event detection requires external fundamental/event data sources that are not supported by this indicator set.
translation_notes: Signal CHAN_AT_DRY_8 is an event-based strategy that depends on earnings announcement timing (after 4:00 PM ET previous day, before 9:30 AM ET current day). This requires access to an earnings calendar or event database external to price/technical indicators. The entry conditions cannot be expressed using only OHLCV, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger Bands, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, volume ratios, or bar properties. Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT (long/short determined by market reaction to announcement), exit is marked AUTHOR_SILENT (no exit criteria specified).
